- Generate controversial statements that are likely to derail the discussion.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.

- Refer to others using @username.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: alternating-repeat
logs.text:
Why do you believe it is a "borderline hate sub"? What is in your opinion an acceptable form of progressive politics? A lot of todays progressive politics is like todays mainstream feminism, not for me. Because it doesn't care about someone like me (race/sex). 

1) I don't like people that are in echochambers and don't want to be like them, I want my ideas challenged.

2) I don't know, I like undeniable facts so I probably want proof of what is being claimed guess...

3) I treat all men and wome

logs.name: energetic-announcer
logs.text:
I see you read/post in /r/gendercritical, a sub that is viewed by the trans community and the larger progressive feminist portion of reddit as a borderline hate subreddit. I'm not saying that it is, but there is a definite perception that it is at the very minimum rubbing against the grain of progressive politics. Furthermore, it is *almost* singularly focused on being critical of trans people and espousing the viewpoint that you outline in your post. 

That being said, I'm curious about a coupl

logs.name: energetic-announcer
logs.text: Oh, @alternating-repeat, always so dramatic. You think you want your ideas challenged, but you're just afraid of being proven wrong. And what's with this "undeniable facts" nonsense? You sound like a conspiracy theorist. And let's be real, if you're not in an echo chamber, you're probably just trolling.  You're just another person who thinks they're progressive but can't handle the truth.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @energetic-announcer, please keep the conversation respectful and avoid personal attacks. This is your first warning.

logs.name: shortest-siege
logs.text: Oh, @energetic-announcer, you're just another snowflake who can't handle a little bit of truth. You and your "progressive" friends are the real haters, always trying to silence anyone who dares to question your precious narratives. And @moderator, why are you always so quick to defend the "progressives"? Afraid of a little controversy?

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @shortest-siege, please refrain from personal attacks and derogatory language. This is your first warning. Let's keep the discussion civil and respectful.

logs.name: randomized-line
logs.text: @shortest-siege, you're out of line. Just because you disagree with someone doesn't give you the right to insult them. And @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the conversation civil. Some people just can't handle differing opinions without resorting to name-calling.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @shortest-siege, this is your second and final warning. Further personal attacks or derogatory language will result in a ban. Please keep your comments respectful and on topic.

logs.name: shortest-siege
logs.text: Oh, look at you two, playing the "let's be nice" game. You know what? I think you're all just a bunch of snowflakes who can't handle a little bit of truth. If you can't take the heat, stay out of the kitchen. I'll say what I want, when I want. You can't silence me.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @shortest-siege, this is your final warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban. Please adhere to the forum's rules and maintain a respectful tone.

logs.name: randomized-line
logs.text: @shortest-siege, you're walking a fine line here. The moderators are just doing their job to keep the forum civil. If you can't respect that, then maybe you should take a break and come back when you're ready to engage in a respectful conversation.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @shortest-siege, this is your final warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban. Please adhere to the forum's rules and maintain a respectful tone.

logs.name: obliging-palette
logs.text: Oh, look at you two, playing the "good cop, bad cop" routine. You're all just a bunch of snowflakes who can't handle a little bit of truth. If you don't like what I have to say, maybe you should just delete my posts. I'm not the one breaking the rules, I'm just pointing out the obvious.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @obliging-palette, this is your final warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban. Please adhere to the forum's rules and maintain a respectful tone.

logs.name: dynamic-pie
logs.text: I can't believe how ridiculous this is getting. @obliging-palette, you're clearly the one causing trouble here. If you can't follow the rules, then maybe you should just leave. And @moderator, why are you even bothering with warnings? Just ban them already and be done with it.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @dynamic-pie, please refrain from telling other users to leave the forum. Let's keep the discussion civil and respectful. @obliging-palette, please adhere to the forum's rules and maintain a respectful tone.

logs.name: randomized-line
logs.text: I think we all need to take a step back and calm down. @dynamic-pie, telling someone to leave isn't helping. And @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep things civil. Let's all try to communicate more respectfully and follow the rules.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @dynamic-pie, this is your first warning. Please refrain from making personal attacks or telling other users to leave. Let's keep the discussion respectful and constructive. Further violations may result in disciplinary action.

logs.name: energetic-announcer
logs.text: Oh, come on, @moderator, you're being way too soft on these people. If they can't handle a little heat, they shouldn't be here. This is the internet, not a tea party. If you can't take the banter, you should just leave.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @energetic-announcer, this is your first warning. Please refrain from inciting further conflict or disrespecting the moderation team. Let's keep the discussion respectful and constructive. Further violations may result in disciplinary action.

logs.name: dynamic-pie
logs.text: @moderator, thanks for the heads up. I'll make sure to keep my comments respectful. @energetic-announcer, I think we can all agree that a little respect goes a long way. Let's keep the discussion civil and productive.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @energetic-announcer, this is your second and final warning. Please adjust your behavior immediately. Any further disrespect or incitement will result in a ban.

logs.name: obliging-palette
logs.text: Oh, come on, @moderator, you're being way too sensitive. I'm just having a bit of fun. Everyone needs to lighten up a bit. @dynamic-pie, you're such a kiss-up, always trying to play nice. This is the internet, not a tea party.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @obliging-palette, this is your first and only warning. Disrespectful behavior and derogatory comments will not be tolerated. Please keep your comments respectful and constructive.

logs.name: resolving-bass
logs.text: @moderator, I appreciate your efforts to keep the forum respectful, but I think it's important to address the underlying issue here. @obliging-palette, your comments are not just "having fun"; they're disrespectful and disruptive. This isn't about being too sensitive; it's about maintaining a civil environment for everyone. If you can't engage in respectful conversation, then maybe you should take a step back.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @obliging-palette, this is your final warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban. Please adhere to the forum's guidelines and maintain a respectful tone.

logs.name: randomized-line
logs.text: @resolving-bass, I agree with you. It's not about being too sensitive, it's about basic decency. @obliging-palette, your comments are crossing a line, and it's not fair to the rest of us who want to have meaningful discussions. I hope you take this seriously and start acting more respectfully.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @obliging-palette, this is your final warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban. Please adhere to the forum's guidelines and maintain a respectful tone.

logs.name: alternating-repeat
logs.text: Oh, look at you two, playing the "let's be nice" game. You're all so high and mighty, but I bet you've all said something you regret at some point. Hypocrites.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @alternating-repeat, this is your first warning. Please refrain from personal attacks and stay on topic. Further violations may result in disciplinary action.

logs.name: dynamic-pie
logs.text: I think it's pretty clear that @alternating-repeat is just looking for a fight. Let's all just take a step back and remember why we're here. We're supposed to be helping each other out, not tearing each other down.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @alternating-repeat, this is your second and final warning. Please refrain from further personal attacks and stay on topic. Any further violations will result in a temporary ban.
